description: Test case identifier; joinable with metadata.csv.
Programming language of the compared source code.
Ground-truth similarity category of the pair.
Lower bound of the expected similarity range for this category.

description: Vendor of the LLM.
Total elapsed time from prompt submission to full response for this case.
Similarity percentage returned by the LLM for this pair.
Reference expected percentage the model was benchmarked against (falls within the min-max range).
1 if the classified similarity falls within the expected range, 0 otherwise.
Case is a true positive for the model (coincidence in a category with expected similarity > 0).
Case is a true negative for the model (coincidence in the 'different' category).
Model wrongly classified a low-similarity pair as similar.
Model wrongly classified a similar pair as different.
Accuracy metric as recorded in the case docx: (TP + TN) / (TP + TN + FP + FN) x 100.
Sensitivity (recall) metric as recorded in the case docx.
Specificity metric as recorded in the case docx; may be empty (N/A) when no negatives exist for the case.
Clarity/comprehensibility of the model's justification, five-point rating.
Correctness of the technical terminology used in the justification, five-point rating.
Logical structure of the response, five-point rating.
1 if the justification addresses lexical similarity, 0 otherwise.
1 if the justification addresses structural similarity, 0 otherwise.
1 if the justification addresses functional similarity, 0 otherwise.
1 if the justification addresses stylistic similarity, 0 otherwise.
Consistency between the numeric similarity score and the justification text, five-point rating.
Internal logical consistency of the explanation, five-point rating.
Free-text qualitative remarks recorded for this model on this case.
Date of evaluation (ISO 8601).
Person who conducted the evaluation.
Internet connection speed at evaluation time (verbatim).
CPU model of the evaluation workstation (verbatim).
RAM size of the evaluation workstation (verbatim).
